title: carya × lecontei
intro: Carya × lecontei, also known as the LeConte's hickory, is a hybrid plant species in the walnut family, resulting from the cross between Carya cordiformis and Carya ovalis. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of juglone, a compound with antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Carya × lecontei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared in herbal forms, such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
